content:
Your code is already correct. It splits the string into an array of words using whitespace as a delimiter, then further splits each element to get the product details and price. The price for the product is obtained from the `priceList` map by its name (productDetails[1]). The order price is calculated by multiplying the quantity in the order with the price of the product.

Please note that you need to ensure that the priceList contains prices for all products before running this code, otherwise it will throw an exception if a product's price is not found. Also, the orderData and productDetails arrays are zero-indexed, so `orderData[0]` would refer to the first element of orderData array which is the product details.
